title: Project Sales Executive (Senior Level)
description:
Responsibilities:

  1. Manage project-based sales opportunities, focusing on CCTV, Door Access, Networking and security solution projects.
  2. Provide tailored product proposals and solutions to meet client project requirements.
  3. Conduct business negotiations and presentations with corporate clients and project stakeholders.
  4. Maintain long-term client and partner relationships, ensuring follow-up and repeat business.
  5. Collaborate with internal technical teams to ensure accurate solution delivery.

Requirements:

  1. Diploma or above preferred, but strong sales/business acumen is more important.
  2. Previous project sales or B2B solution sales experience is an advantage.
  3. Good business negotiation and communication skills, with professional appearance and presentation.
  4. Strong interpersonal skills, able to engage with corporate clients and decision-makers.
  5. Self-driven, responsible, and result-oriented.

Remuneration:

  • Basic Salary around SGD 4,000
  • Monthly total income: SGD 4,000 – 6,000 (basic + commission, depending on performance)

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2008, VISKOU swiftly solidified its position as a highly successful multi-brand distributor of electronic surveillance products. We proudly serve as the authorized distributor for HIKVISION in Singapore.


VISKOU has emerged as a leading distributor of security products, distinguished by our unwavering dedication to excellence. We've made substantial investments in nurturing our sales and technical teams, positioning them as exemplars of top-tier service for our esteemed clientele.


As an innovative and forward-thinking corporation, VISKOU has forged an outstanding reputation within the security industry. We proudly hold the title of an authorized distributor for esteemed brands in the security and electronics sector, including renowned names like HIKVISION and UTEPO.


At VISKOU, we provide a comprehensive range of professional services encompassing project proposal development and tender design. We commit to being your enduring, reliable, and steadfast partner in the long run, ensuring that your security requirements are consistently met with excellence.


Why join us?


When you join Viskou, you're not just starting a job; you're embarking on a journey of professional development and personal growth. We invest in our employees through ongoing training, mentorship programs, and clear paths for advancement.


We aim to be the best company to work for, because we treat every employee just like our family. Our commitment to work-life balance means you can excel in your career while enjoying time with your loved ones. Our diverse and inclusive workplace encourages collaboration, creativity, and fresh perspectives.


Join us in making a meaningful impact in CCTV and security field. Discover the opportunities, benefits, and supportive community that await you at Viskou. Take the first step towards a fulfilling career; explore our current openings and join our team today!
postedCompany.name: VISKOU SYSTEM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
